# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-13

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-13

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// all build types.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_NM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/nm

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJCOPY:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/objcopy

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_OBJDUMP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/objdump

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=DMOD OS Interface for FreeRTOS

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=dmosi_freertos

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION:STATIC=1.0

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_MAJOR:STATIC=1

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_MINOR:STATIC=0

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_PATCH:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION_TWEAK:STATIC=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ranlib

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_READELF:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/readelf

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Build examples
DMOD_BUILD_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Build templates
DMOD_BUILD_TEMPLATES:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
DMOD_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build tools
DMOD_BUILD_TOOLS:BOOL=OFF

//Name of the target cpu, if empty, the target is generic
DMOD_CPU_NAME:STRING=

//DMOD source directory
DMOD_DIR:PATH=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps/dmod-src

//Directory for DMFC files
DMOD_DMFC_DIR:STRING=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/dmfc

//Directory for DMF files
DMOD_DMF_DIR:STRING=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/dmf

//Use external registration
DMOD_EXTERNAL_REGISTRATION:BOOL=ON

//Maximum number of modules
DMOD_MAX_MODULES:STRING=30

//Maximum number of required modules
DMOD_MAX_REQUIRED_MODULES:STRING=10

//Minimum code coverage percentage
DMOD_MIN_COVERAGE:STRING=40

//DMOD build mode
DMOD_MODE:STRING=DMOD_SYSTEM

//Directory for DMF files inside the system
DMOD_REPO_DIR:STRING=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/dmf

//Paths to the repositories inside the system in an array
DMOD_REPO_PATHS:STRING=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/dmf:/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/dmfc

//Path to the scripts directory
DMOD_SCRIPTS_DIR:PATH=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps/dmod-src/scripts

//Major version of your system
DMOD_SYSTEM_VERSION_MAJOR:STRING=0

//Minor version of your system
DMOD_SYSTEM_VERSION_MINOR:STRING=1

//Name of the tools configuration
DMOD_TOOLS_NAME:STRING=arch/x86_64

//Enable to use aligned allocation
DMOD_USE_ALIGNED_ALLOC:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use aligned malloc mock if aligned allocation is not
// available
DMOD_USE_ALIGNED_MALLOC_MOCK:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to use the assert function
DMOD_USE_ASSERT:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use the environ global variable
DMOD_USE_ENVIRON:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use exceptions
DMOD_USE_EXCEPTIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to use the FastLZ compression library
DMOD_USE_FASTLZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use the getenv function
DMOD_USE_GETENV:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use memory management functions
DMOD_USE_MMAN:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use the pthread library
DMOD_USE_PTHREAD:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use the realloc function
DMOD_USE_REALLOC:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use the stdio library
DMOD_USE_STDIO:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use the standard library
DMOD_USE_STDLIB:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use termios for terminal I/O control (echo, canonical
// mode)
DMOD_USE_TERMIOS:BOOL=ON

//Enable to use time.h for system time functions (clock_gettime)
DMOD_USE_TIME:BOOL=ON

//Architecture of the target microcontroller (e.g. armv7)
DMOSI_ARCH:STRING=xtensa

//Microcontroller family (e.g. cortex-m7)
DMOSI_ARCH_FAMILY:STRING=esp32

//Build tests
DMOSI_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Compiler toolchain used for FreeRTOS port selection (default:
// gcc)
DMOSI_COMPILER:STRING=gcc

//CPU clock frequency in Hz
DMOSI_CPU_CLOCK_HZ:STRING=20000000

//Do not implement DMOD API in dmosi library
DMOSI_DONT_IMPLEMENT_DMOD_API:BOOL=OFF

//Do not implement DMOD Environment API in dmosi library
DMOSI_DONT_IMPLEMENT_DMOD_API_ENV:BOOL=OFF

//Do not implement DMOD Mutex API in dmosi library
DMOSI_DONT_IMPLEMENT_DMOD_API_MUTEX:BOOL=OFF

//Do not implement DMOD Process API in dmosi library
DMOSI_DONT_IMPLEMENT_DMOD_API_PROC:BOOL=OFF

//Do not implement DMOD Time API in dmosi library
DMOSI_DONT_IMPLEMENT_DMOD_API_TIME:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
DMOSI_FREERTOS_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Build tests
DMOSI_PROC_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Tick rate frequency in Hz
DMOSI_TICK_RATE_HZ:STRING=100

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for dmod
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_DMOD:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for dmosi
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_DMOSI:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of dmod
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_DMOD:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of dmosi
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_DMOSI:BOOL=OFF

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//Value Computed by CMake
dmod_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps/dmod-build

//Value Computed by CMake
dmod_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
dmod_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps/dmod-src

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps/dmosi-build

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/_deps/dmosi-src

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_freertos_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_freertos_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Dependencies for the target
dmosi_freertos_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;dmosi;general;dmosi_proc;general;freertos_kernel;

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_freertos_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_proc_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32/lib/dmosi-proc

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_proc_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
dmosi_proc_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;dmosi;

//Value Computed by CMake
dmosi_proc_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/lib/dmosi-proc

# INTERNAL cache entries

CMAKE_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=/home/runner/work/dmosi-freertos/dmosi-freertos/build_esp32
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=31
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=6

CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/local/bin/cmake

CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/local/bin/ctest

GIT_EXECUTABLE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//linker supports push/pop state
_CMAKE_CXX_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE
//linker supports push/pop state
_CMAKE_C_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE
//linker supports push/pop state
_CMAKE_LINKER_PUSHPOP_STATE_SUPPORTED:INTERNAL=TRUE
